definitions.text: skade seg på ild, varme eller sviende stoff
definitions.translation: injure oneself on fire, heat, or a stinging substance

examples.no: kaffen var så varm at han brente seg
examples.en: the coffee was so hot that he burned himself

examples.no: hun brente seg på en brennmanet
examples.en: she was stung by a jellyfish

definitions.text: erfare at noe får svært uheldige følger
definitions.translation: experience that something has very unfortunate consequences

examples.en: get burned on a stock trade
